'''âr-b-n''' ('''karaban''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrangulate|quadrangulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrangulate|quadrangulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-b-n
|-
! Lemma
| karaban
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiraban|thiraban]] || [[word:jiraban|jiraban]] || [[word:shiraban|shiraban]] || [[word:kiraban|kiraban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuraban|thuthuraban]] || [[word:jujuraban|jujuraban]] || [[word:shushuraban|shushuraban]] || [[word:kukuraban|kukuraban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuraban|thuraban]] || [[word:juraban|juraban]] || [[word:shuraban|shuraban]] || [[word:kuraban|kuraban]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuraban|thuraban]] || [[word:juraban|juraban]] || [[word:shuraban|shuraban]] || [[word:kuraban|kuraban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theraban|theraban]] || [[word:jeraban|jeraban]] || [[word:sheraban|sheraban]] || [[word:keraban|keraban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoraban|thothoraban]] || [[word:jojoraban|jojoraban]] || [[word:shoshoraban|shoshoraban]] || [[word:kokoraban|kokoraban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoraban|thoraban]] || [[word:joraban|joraban]] || [[word:shoraban|shoraban]] || [[word:koraban|koraban]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoraban|thoraban]] || [[word:joraban|joraban]] || [[word:shoraban|shoraban]] || [[word:koraban|koraban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠraban|thĂŠraban]] || [[word:jĂŠraban|jĂŠraban]] || [[word:shĂŠraban|shĂŠraban]] || [[word:kĂŠraban|kĂŠraban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharaban|thatharaban]] || [[word:jajaraban|jajaraban]] || [[word:shasharaban|shasharaban]] || [[word:kakaraban|kakaraban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharaban|tharaban]] || [[word:jaraban|jaraban]] || [[word:sharaban|sharaban]] || [[word:karaban|karaban]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharaban|tharaban]] || [[word:jaraban|jaraban]] || [[word:sharaban|sharaban]] || [[word:karaban|karaban]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharaban|sharaban]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharaban|gosharaban]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharaban|gokisharaban]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharabanĂŒ|sharabanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharabanknĂŒ|gosharabanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabanĂŒ|gokisharabanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharabanshĂ«|sharabanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharabankshĂ«|gosharabankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharabanshĂ«|gokisharabanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabanro|sharabanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabankro|gosharabankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabanro|gokisharabanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabanmu|sharabanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabankmu|gosharabankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabanmu|gokisharabanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharabansher|sharabansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharabanksher|gosharabanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharabansher|gokisharabansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharabang|sharabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharabankng|gosharabankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharabang|gokisharabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharabanya|sharabanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharabankya|gosharabankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharabanya|gokisharabanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharabanyam|sharabanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharabankyam|gosharabankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharabanyam|gokisharabanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharabanĂŒshĂ«|sharabanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharabanknĂŒshĂ«|gosharabanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharabanĂŒshĂ«|gokisharabanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabanĂŒro|sharabanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabanknĂŒro|gosharabanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabanĂŒro|gokisharabanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabanĂŒmu|sharabanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabanknĂŒmu|gosharabanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabanĂŒmu|gokisharabanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharabanshĂ«nĂŒ|sharabanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharabankshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharabankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharabanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabanshĂ«ro|sharabanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabankshĂ«ro|gosharabankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabanshĂ«ro|gokisharabanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabanshĂ«mu|sharabanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabankshĂ«mu|gosharabankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabanshĂ«mu|gokisharabanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharabanronĂŒ|sharabanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharabankronĂŒ|gosharabankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabanronĂŒ|gokisharabanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharabanroshĂ«|sharabanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharabankroshĂ«|gosharabankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharabanroshĂ«|gokisharabanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharabanromu|sharabanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharabankromu|gosharabankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharabanromu|gokisharabanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharabanmunĂŒ|sharabanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharabankmunĂŒ|gosharabankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharabanmunĂŒ|gokisharabanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharabanmushĂ«|sharabanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharabankmushĂ«|gosharabankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharabanmushĂ«|gokisharabanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharabanmuro|sharabanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharabankmuro|gosharabankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharabanmuro|gokisharabanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
